title: Reapers Reception
description:
In this game, you play as a young woman looking for the murderer of her sister. You have infiltrated "Reapers Reception", a hotel and safe haven for criminals. You soon learn that tonight will be the last night you can use the hotel's resources to find out who killed your sister 15 years ago, and time is running out.

• Discover the hotel and its secrets through fully voice-acted dialogue and optional phone calls

• Check in new guests, but be aware: some guests will try to trick you and provide false information

• Learn more about 80 guests through their police files, each with their own unique backstory

• Keep track of your guests and their disturbing violations of hotel policy

• Confront guests who breached hotel policy in a deadly stand-off

• Uncover the protagonist's story, fears, and past

• Overcome multiple threats and killers through different mechanics

• Unlock three different endings based on your in-game choices

If you encounter any bugs or glitches, or if you want to let me know what you think of this game, make sure to leave a review!

You can also contact me directly via Steam or Discord! My Discord tag is linked in my Steam profile (which you can access by clicking the developer tag at the top of the page)

Have fun!
description_short: Manage a hotel for criminals, spot anomalies, and find out who killed your sister 15 years ago.
